seo.title: Modelarna — physical 3D architectural models
seo.description: Upload your 3D house or study model and we will make a physical scale model you can hold. For architects and designers across Europe.
seo.ogDescription: From your project we make a model you can hold in your hands.
seo.keywords: 3D printing architecture, physical house model, architectural model, PLA model, scale model

common.footerTagline: Physical models of your projects. We manufacture using FDM technology with biopolymer PLA.

home.heroLead: Upload the 3D model of your house, pavilion or study and we will make a physical model you can hold and show to your client.
home.stepsTitle: From file to finished model in 4 steps.
home.step1Desc: Drag & drop from your CAD software or directly as STL.
home.step2Desc: Scale, color, detail quality. See the price instantly.
home.step3Desc: Within 24 h we send the final price and timeline. No obligation.
home.step4Desc: Carefully packaged — courier delivery across Europe.
home.formatsLead: From most CAD and BIM tools — Revit, ArchiCAD, SketchUp, Rhino, Fusion 360, Blender. 2D drawings (DWG, DXF) cannot be printed — we need a volumetric 3D model.
home.ctaTitle: Upload your project and see the price right away.
home.faq1q: What scale is best for a single-family house?
home.faq1a: Most often 1:100 (fits on a desk, readable windows and balconies) or 1:200 for larger estates. Smaller details are handled individually per model.
home.faq2q: What material are the models made of?
home.faq2a: Standard biopolymer PLA — strong, stable and recyclable. FDM manufacturing with 0.4 mm or 0.2 mm nozzle depending on detail.
home.faq3q: What if the model is hollow — without wall thickness?
home.faq3a: We will contact you. Often a simple fix is enough (extrude walls to 1–2 mm at print scale). We can also handle it for you in the quote.
home.faq4q: Why don't you accept DWG or DXF?
home.faq4a: These formats are typically 2D floor plans and sections — they lack volume, so a physical model cannot be made directly. If you only have drawings, we also offer dedicated modelling.
home.faq5q: How long do production and delivery take?
home.faq5a: Standard order 5–10 business days after confirmation. Delivery across Europe by courier. Express within 48 h for an extra fee.

order.title: Upload model
order.lead: Upload your model, choose scale, color and nozzle. For STL, OBJ and 3MF we show an indicative price and material usage instantly; other formats after review.
order.dropHint: or click to browse · max 100 MB
order.manualFormat: We convert .{{ext}} manually — indicative price within 24 h after model review.
order.scale1to1Hint: Model is already at the desired size — we print the file as-is without scaling.
order.scaleTooSmallOption: Scale {{scale}} unavailable — smallest dimension would be {{minMm}} mm (minimum {{min}} mm).
order.scaleSomeUnavailable: Scales {{scales}} are unavailable — printing would leave at least one axis under {{min}} mm.
order.scaleNoViableScale: The model is too small even at 1:1 (shortest axis under {{min}} mm). Try a larger file or contact us.
order.name: Name *
order.consent: I agree to the processing of my data for this request.
order.materialEstimateHint: Indicative estimate: mesh volume × 100% infill — not slicer G-code output.
order.disclaimer: This is not a binding order. Price and material are indicative before model review.

viewer.unsupported: Preview available for STL and STEP/STP. You can submit the file without a preview.
viewer.error: Could not load preview. You can still submit the file — we will review the model manually.
viewer.idle: Upload an STL or STEP model.

thankYou.title: Thank you!
thankYou.body: We have your model and request. We will follow up with next steps shortly.
thankYou.step2: You receive confirmation and details by email
thankYou.step3: After approval we schedule printing and delivery
thankYou.estimateNote: We will confirm the final price after reviewing your model.
